examples: To improve the interface and tool set by which individuals and media entities are able to spectate and broadcast Counter-Strike.
I cannot believe that anyone should want to spectate the ordinariness of my existence, for I certainly have no wish to spectate anyone else's.
You will be able to do other game-related functions, like chat with friends and spectate game tournaments.
Sometimes, neighbors on one side of the state line will matter, while others can only spectate.
OnLive's Spectate feature is nothing new, of course, letting you keep tabs on friends and scores of other players.
